title: Well-done: Idempotent init with mutex protection
description: lora_l2.c:229-233 makes lichen_lora_l2_init() idempotent (returns success if already initialized) and the check is inside the mutex to prevent TOCTOU races. The SECURITY comment explains why: two threads could both pass an unprotected check and generate different EUI-64 values. This is correct defensive programming for an init function that might be called from multiple paths.
